rules.read_when: Using Flutter tooling, MCP, shell, or debug commands

cursor.description: [mandatory] How to use Flutter tooling, MCP servers, and shell commands

rules.read_when: Working with Dart or Flutter code in this app

cursor.description: [default] otaku_room Dart and Flutter overlays, tooling, and lint policy

rules.read_when: Making Dart or Flutter structure decisions

cursor.description: [advisory] Project module layout and file placement

rules.read_when: Working with `common/` module utilities, UI helpers, or widgets

cursor.description: [advisory] Cookbook for common/ utilities, UI helpers, and widgets
[default] Dart and Flutter test scope, ownership, and shared test layout
[mandatory] otaku_room_lint rule implementation and test guidance

agent_prompts.name: dart-verify
agent_prompts.description: Dart and Flutter verification specialist for finished changes.

agent_prompts.name: l10n
agent_prompts.description: L10n specialist for ARB keys, Chinese extraction, formatting, and locale translation.
